pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_nuxeo.sh line 227-230 uploads Contract_Template.pdf to /default-domain/workspaces/Templates/Contract-Template; setup_task.sh line 15 verifies this path; Nuxeo documentation confirms standard /default-domain/workspaces/... path structure
Code analysis: setup_nuxeo.sh lines 246-250 creates user 'jsmith'; setup_task.sh line 46-50 ensures user jsmith exists; setup_task.sh line 69 assigns workflow to 'user:jsmith'

Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 64 starts workflow with id 'SerialDocumentReview'; Web search confirmed this is a real, standard Nuxeo Platform built-in workflow documented at https://doc.nuxeo.com/nxdoc/serial-document-workflow/

privileged_info_summary: The task is to cancel a stalled 'SerialDocumentReview' workflow in Nuxeo Platform. The target document is located at /default-domain/workspaces/Templates/Contract-Template and the workflow is assigned to user 'jsmith'. SerialDocumentReview is a standard Nuxeo Platform built-in workflow for serial document review processes. All document paths and user identifiers use standard Nuxeo conventions. The test data is synthetically created within setup scripts.
